test-case.name: FullLifecycle_PreparationToDefeat
test-case.output: [GameManager] 状态变更: Preparation -> InProgress [GameManager] 状态变更: InProgress -> Defeat

test-case.name: FullLifecycle_PreparationToVictory
test-case.output: [GameManager] 状态变更: Preparation -> InProgress [GameManager] 状态变更: InProgress -> Victory

test-case.name: LoseGame_FromInProgress_ShouldTransitionToDefeat
test-case.output: [GameManager] 状态变更: Preparation -> InProgress [GameManager] 状态变更: InProgress -> Defeat

test-case.name: LoseGame_NotFromInProgress_ShouldNotChangeState
test-case.output: [GameManager] 只有在游戏进行中才能判定失败

test-case.name: ResetGame_FromVictory_ShouldTransitionToPreparation
test-case.output: [GameManager] 状态变更: Preparation -> InProgress [GameManager] 状态变更: InProgress -> Victory [GameManager] 状态变更: Victory -> Preparation

test-case.name: ResetGame_ShouldTransitionToPreparation
test-case.output: [GameManager] 状态变更: Preparation -> InProgress [GameManager] 状态变更: InProgress -> Preparation

test-case.name: SetState_ManualTransition_ShouldWork
test-case.output: [GameManager] 状态变更: Preparation -> Victory

test-case.name: StartGame_FromPreparation_ShouldTransitionToInProgress
test-case.output: [GameManager] 状态变更: Preparation -> InProgress

test-case.name: StartGame_NotFromPreparation_ShouldNotChangeState
test-case.output: [GameManager] 状态变更: Preparation -> InProgress [GameManager] 只能在准备阶段开始游戏

test-case.name: StateChange_ShouldFireEvent_WithCorrectOldAndNewStates
test-case.output: [GameManager] 状态变更: Preparation -> InProgress

test-case.name: WinGame_FromInProgress_ShouldTransitionToVictory
test-case.output: [GameManager] 状态变更: Preparation -> InProgress [GameManager] 状态变更: InProgress -> Victory

test-case.name: WinGame_NotFromInProgress_ShouldNotChangeState
test-case.output: [GameManager] 只有在游戏进行中才能判定胜利

test-case.name: IsCellOccupied_OutOfBounds_ShouldReturnTrue
test-case.output: [GridSystem] 网格初始化完成: 5 行 x 10 列, 原点: (-6.00, -4.00, 0.00) [GridSystem] 检查占用超出范围: (-1, 0) [GridSystem] 检查占用超出范围: (0, -1) [GridSystem] 检查占用超出范围: (5, 0) [GridSystem] 检查占用超出范围: (0, 10)

test-case.name: OccupyCell_EmptyCell_ShouldReturnTrue
test-case.output: [GridSystem] 网格初始化完成: 5 行 x 10 列, 原点: (-6.00, -4.00, 0.00) [GridSystem] 格子 (0, 0) 被占用: TestOccupant

test-case.name: OccupyCell_OccupiedCell_ShouldReturnFalse
test-case.output: [GridSystem] 网格初始化完成: 5 行 x 10 列, 原点: (-6.00, -4.00, 0.00) [GridSystem] 格子 (0, 0) 被占用: Occupant1 [GridSystem] 格子 (0, 0) 已被占用

test-case.name: OccupyCell_OutOfBounds_ShouldReturnFalse
test-case.output: [GridSystem] 网格初始化完成: 5 行 x 10 列, 原点: (-6.00, -4.00, 0.00) [GridSystem] 占用格子超出范围: (-1, 0)

test-case.name: ReleaseCell_OccupiedCell_ShouldClearOccupation
test-case.output: [GridSystem] 网格初始化完成: 5 行 x 10 列, 原点: (-6.00, -4.00, 0.00) [GridSystem] 格子 (1, 1) 被占用: TestOccupant [GridSystem] 释放格子 (1, 1)

test-case.name: ReleaseRow_OutOfBounds_ShouldNotThrow
test-case.output: [GridSystem] 网格初始化完成: 5 行 x 10 列, 原点: (-6.00, -4.00, 0.00) [GridSystem] 释放行超出范围: -1 [GridSystem] 释放行超出范围: 5

test-case.name: ReleaseRow_ShouldClearAllCellsInRow
test-case.output: [GridSystem] 网格初始化完成: 5 行 x 10 列, 原点: (-6.00, -4.00, 0.00) [GridSystem] 格子 (2, 0) 被占用: Occupant0 [GridSystem] 格子 (2, 5) 被占用: Occupant1 [GridSystem] 已释放第 2 行所有格子

test-case.name: InitialState_ShouldNotBeTriggered
test-case.output: [LaneManager] 跑道管理器初始化, 跑道数量: 1

test-case.name: Trigger_CalledTwice_ShouldNotThrow
test-case.output: [LaneManager] 跑道管理器初始化, 跑道数量: 1 [LaneManager] 跑道 0 小车已注册 [LaneCar] 小车 0 触发！清除跑道全部怪物 [LaneManager] 跑道 0 已清除 [LaneCar] 小车 0 已被触发，忽略重复触发

test-case.name: Trigger_CalledTwice_ShouldOnlyTriggerOnce
test-case.output: [LaneManager] 跑道管理器初始化, 跑道数量: 1 [LaneManager] 跑道 0 小车已注册 [LaneCar] 小车 0 触发！清除跑道全部怪物 [LaneManager] 跑道 0 已清除 [LaneCar] 小车 0 已被触发，忽略重复触发

test-case.name: Trigger_ShouldFireOnCarTriggeredEvent
test-case.output: [LaneManager] 跑道管理器初始化, 跑道数量: 1 [LaneManager] 跑道 0 小车已注册 [LaneCar] 小车 0 触发！清除跑道全部怪物 [LaneManager] 跑道 0 已清除

test-case.name: Trigger_ShouldSetIsTriggeredToTrue
test-case.output: [LaneManager] 跑道管理器初始化, 跑道数量: 1 [LaneManager] 跑道 0 小车已注册 [LaneCar] 小车 0 触发！清除跑道全部怪物 [LaneManager] 跑道 0 已清除

test-case.name: ClearLane_ShouldNotThrow

test-case.name: OnAllCarsTriggered_ShouldFireWhenAllCarsTriggered
test-case.output: [GridSystem] 网格初始化完成: 5 行 x 10 列, 原点: (-6.00, -4.00, 0.00) [LaneManager] 跑道管理器初始化, 跑道数量: 1 [LaneManager] 跑道 0 小车已注册 [LaneCar] 小车 0 触发！清除跑道全部怪物 [GridSystem] 已释放第 0 行所有格子 [LaneManager] 跑道 0 已清除 [LaneManager] 所有小车已消耗！

test-case.name: RegisterCar_ShouldMakeCarAvailable

test-case.name: TriggerCar_ShouldTriggerCarAndFireEvent

test-case.name: UnregisterCar_ShouldMakeCarUnavailable
test-case.output: [GridSystem] 网格初始化完成: 5 行 x 10 列, 原点: (-6.00, -4.00, 0.00) [LaneManager] 跑道管理器初始化, 跑道数量: 1 [LaneManager] 跑道 0 小车已注册 [LaneManager] 跑道 0 小车已注销

test-case.name: AutoExpand_ShouldCreateMultipleObjects_WhenPoolEmpty

test-case.name: ClearAllPools_ShouldDestroyAllObjects
test-case.output: [ObjectPool] 创建对象池 'Bullet', 初始大小: 3 [ObjectPool] 创建对象池 'Orb', 初始大小: 2

test-case.name: ClearPool_ShouldDestroyAllObjectsInPool
test-case.output: [ObjectPool] 创建对象池 'Bullet', 初始大小: 3

test-case.name: CreatePool_DuplicateName_ShouldNotCreateDuplicate
test-case.output: [ObjectPool] 创建对象池 'Orb', 初始大小: 3 [ObjectPool] 对象池 'Orb' 已存在

test-case.name: CreatePool_ShouldPreInstantiateObjects
test-case.output: [ObjectPool] 创建对象池 'Bullet', 初始大小: 5

test-case.name: Get_NonExistentPool_ShouldReturnNull
test-case.output: [ObjectPool] 对象池 'NonExistent' 不存在

test-case.name: Get_ShouldDecrementPoolCount

test-case.name: Get_ShouldReturnActiveObject

test-case.name: Get_WhenPoolEmpty_WithAutoExpand_ShouldCreateNewObject

test-case.name: Get_WhenPoolEmpty_WithoutAutoExpand_ShouldReturnNull
test-case.output: [ObjectPool] 创建对象池 'Bullet', 初始大小: 0 [ObjectPool] 对象池 'Bullet' 已空且未启用自动扩展

test-case.name: GetAfterReturn_ShouldReuseSameObject
test-case.output: [ObjectPool] 创建对象池 'Bullet', 初始大小: 1

test-case.name: MultiplePools_ShouldBeIndependent

test-case.name: Return_NonExistentPool_ShouldDestroyObject

test-case.name: Return_ShouldDeactivateAndReparent
